SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-18-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $200.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $2600.00 IS PAID. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTS ON ANY PAYMENT. FIRST PAYMENT ON JULY 15, 2011. IF NO APPEARANCE ON DECEMBER 18, 2012, CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS FOR DISMISSAL.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE : DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
